summary: Feature request to bind SkGraphics::SetOpenTypeSVGDecoderFactory() in SKGraphics to enable OT-SVG colour font rendering support.

repoLinks.description: skia-python reference implementation registering SkSVGOpenTypeSVGDecoder factory
Shell script for Skia build options referenced by reporter
Related issue: SkSVGDOM bindings (SVG module), noted as possible prerequisite

analysis.summary: The reporter requests exposing SkGraphics::SetOpenTypeSVGDecoderFactory() so that OT-SVG colour fonts (a Skia feature available since ~m103) can be enabled in SkiaSharp. No such binding exists in the current codebase. The reporter (who authored the skia-python equivalent) points to SKGraphics.cs as the logical home, and notes the SVG module must be built into libSkiaSharp as a prerequisite.

codeInvestigation.finding: SKGraphics class wraps sk_graphics_* C API calls (Init, font cache, resource cache, DumpMemoryStatistics). There is no SetOpenTypeSVGDecoderFactory method or any OT-SVG / SVGDecoder binding.

Generated P/Invoke bindings cover sk_graphics_init, sk_graphics_purge_*, sk_graphics_get/set_font_cache_*, sk_graphics_get/set_resource_cache_*, sk_graphics_dump_memory_statistics. No sk_graphics_set_opentype_svg_decoder or similar function is present.

keySignals.text: The line switches on OT-SVG colour font support within skia.
keySignals.interpretation: A single factory registration call at load time activates the feature

keySignals.text: Seems the logical place for adding this is in https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/blob/main/binding/SkiaSharp/SKGraphics.cs
keySignals.interpretation: Reporter has identified the exact file where the C# binding should be added

keySignals.text: you need the svg module for the functionality I mentioned. The svg module became non-experimental in m88.
keySignals.interpretation: Enabling the SVG module in the native build is a prerequisite; related to #2689

analysis.rationale: This is a feature request: an existing Skia C++ API (SkGraphics::SetOpenTypeSVGDecoderFactory) is not exposed in SkiaSharp. The request is clearly scoped, the reporter identified the target file, and there is a skia-python reference implementation. The main uncertainty is whether the SVG module is currently compiled into libSkiaSharp.native (needed as prerequisite). Classified as type/feature-request / area/SkiaSharp / backend/SVG, action needs-investigation to confirm the SVG module build flag and design the C API shim.

resolution.hypothesis: Adding OT-SVG colour font support requires: (1) confirming the SVG module is enabled in the libSkiaSharp native build, (2) adding a C API function sk_graphics_set_opentype_svg_decoder_factory in externals/skia/src/c/ that calls SkGraphics::SetOpenTypeSVGDecoderFactory with SkSVGOpenTypeSVGDecoder::Factory, (3) regenerating bindings, and (4) adding a C# wrapper method to SKGraphics.

proposals.title: Implement full binding: C API shim + C# wrapper in SKGraphics
proposals.description: Add sk_graphics_set_opentype_svg_decoder_factory() to the C shim, regenerate P/Invoke bindings, then add SKGraphics.SetOpenTypeSVGDecoderFactory() in SKGraphics.cs. This mirrors the skia-python approach. Prerequisite: verify SVG module is included in the Skia native build (same concern as #2689).

proposals.title: Investigate and link SVG module prerequisite (#2689)
proposals.description: Before implementing, confirm whether the Skia native build already includes the SVG module (MODULE.bazel / BUILD.bazel / GN args). If not, this feature blocks on resolving #2689 first.

resolution.recommendedReason: The binding is well-understood and low-effort; the SVG module concern can be validated in parallel.

actionability.reason: Well-scoped feature request with a clear reference implementation (skia-python). Needs investigation to confirm SVG module availability in the native build before implementing the C API shim and C# wrapper.

actions.description: Link to related issue #2689 (SkSVGDOM bindings / SVG module prerequisite)
Acknowledge the feature request, confirm no binding exists, explain the two-step path (SVG module + C API shim + C# wrapper), reference skia-python as the implementation guide.
actions.comment:
Thanks for the detailed request and for pointing to the skia-python reference implementation!

We've confirmed that `SkGraphics::SetOpenTypeSVGDecoderFactory()` is not yet bound in SkiaSharp. Adding it would require:

1. **Confirming the SVG module is included** in the `libSkiaSharp` native build (this is also tracked in #2689)
2. **Adding a C API shim** in `externals/skia/src/c/` — something like:
   ```cpp
   void sk_graphics_set_opentype_svg_decoder_factory() {
       SkGraphics::SetOpenTypeSVGDecoderFactory(SkSVGOpenTypeSVGDecoder::Factory);
   }
   ```
3. **Regenerating bindings** (`pwsh ./utils/generate.ps1`)
4. **Adding the C# wrapper** to `binding/SkiaSharp/SKGraphics.cs`

This is tracked as a feature request. If you'd like to contribute a PR following the [adding APIs guide](../documentation/dev/adding-apis.md), that would be very welcome!
